briefdescription.para: This function handles setting of DFU state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to DFU instance of the controller
is a value of the DFU state to be set

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if the function is successful.
XST_FAILURE if an Error occurred.

briefdescription.para: This function updates the current state while downloading a file.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to DFU instance of the controller
is a pointer of the DFU status

briefdescription.para: This function handles getting of DFU status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to DFU instance of the controller
is the pointer of the DFU status

briefdescription.para: This function handles USB disconnect, called from driver.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller

briefdescription.para: This function handles USB reset, called from driver.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller

briefdescription.para: This function handles set interface request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller
is a pointer to setup token of control transfer

briefdescription.para: This function handles UAC1 class request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller
is a pointer to setup token of control transfer

briefdescription.para: This function handles DFU heart and soul of DFU state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller
is a pointer to setup token of control transfer

briefdescription.para: This function is class handler for Mass storage and is called when Setup packet received is for Class request(not Standard Device request)

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Usb_DevData instance.
is pointer to SetupPacket received.

briefdescription.para: This function is class handler for HID and is called when Setup packet received is for Class request(not a Standard Device request)

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Usb_DevData instance.
is pointer to SetupPacket received.

briefdescription.para: This function is class request handler for composite device Setup packet received is for Class request(not a Standard Device request)

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Usb_DevData instance.
is pointer to SetupPacket received.

briefdescription.para: This function handles Reduced Block Command (RBC) requests from the host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller.
is a pointer to storage interface

briefdescription.para: This function is used to send SCSI Command Status Wrapper to Host.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Usb_DevData instance.
is the data residue.

detaileddescription.para: task will get host and act accordingly

parameterdescription.para: private parameters.

briefdescription.para: This task implements SCSI command functionality.

detaileddescription.para: task will get command from host and act accordingly

parameterdescription.para: private parameters.

briefdescription.para: This task implements audio record functionality.

parameterdescription.para: private parameters.

briefdescription.para: This task implements audio playback functionality.

parameterdescription.para: private parameters.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the composite device specific class code for the example.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 rb 28/03/18 First release 1.5 vak 13/02/19 Added support for versal 1.5 vak 03/25/19 Fixed incorrect data_alignment pragma directive for IAR 1.18 ka 08/21/25 Fixed GCC warnings
